photos.title: Amalfi Coast Sunset Glow
photos.caption: Sunset over the Amalfi cliffs
photos.description: Soft pastel sunset light over the Amalfi Coast, with boats anchored near the shore and terraced houses climbing the cliffs.

photos.title: Golden Hour in Positano
photos.caption: Positano at dusk
photos.description: Colorful houses of Positano stacked on the hillside as the sun dips into the Tyrrhenian Sea.

photos.title: Florence Arno River Sunset
photos.caption: Arno reflections
photos.description: Bridges over the Arno River catching the last orange light of the day in Florence.

photos.title: Roman Forum at Sunset
photos.caption: Warm light over ancient ruins
photos.description: The columns of the Roman Forum lit by a fiery sky as the sun sets behind the city.

photos.caption: Boats on the Grand Canal

photos.caption: Vernazza in the last light
photos.description: The pastel houses of Vernazza catch the last sunrays as the sky turns deep purple and orange.

photos.caption: Peaks in evening haze

photos.title: Tuscan Vineyard Sunset
photos.caption: Rolling hills in golden light
photos.description: Long shadows stretch across rows of vines as the sun sets over the Tuscan countryside.

photos.title: Puglia Trulli Sunset

photos.title: Machu Picchu Sunlit Peaks

photos.title: Brooklyn Bridge Park Sunset
photos.caption: Manhattan skyline at dusk
photos.description: The Manhattan skyline lights up as the sun sets behind the city, viewed from Brooklyn Bridge Park.

albums.title: Christmas in London 2022

trip_days.title: Day 4 – Machu Picchu Sunrise
trip_days.summary: An early start to hike up to the Guardhouse and watch the first light spill over the ruins of Machu Picchu and the surrounding peaks.

trip_days.title: Christmas Eve on the Thames
trip_days.summary: A festive walk along the Thames taking in Westminster Bridge, Big Ben, and the South Bank Christmas market lights.

trip_days.title: Brooklyn Bridge Park Sunset
trip_days.summary: Crossed over to Brooklyn Bridge Park to watch the sun set behind the Manhattan skyline and the bridges.

trip_days.title: Amalfi Coast Cliffs
trip_days.summary: First day on the Amalfi Coast, exploring cliffside viewpoints and watching boats drift below at sunset.

trip_days.title: Evening in Positano
trip_days.summary: Wandered Positano’s steep lanes, then settled on the beach to capture the town glowing in golden hour light.

trip_days.title: Florence and the Arno
trip_days.summary: A slower day in Florence, finishing with sunset reflections over the Arno and the old bridges.

trip_days.title: Ancient Rome at Dusk
trip_days.summary: Explored the Roman Forum and Colosseum area, staying until the ruins caught the last warm light of the day.

trip_days.title: Grand Canal Evening
trip_days.summary: Rode vaporetto lines along the Grand Canal and photographed gondolas weaving through Venice at sunset.

trip_days.title: Cinque Terre Clifftop Views
trip_days.summary: Hiked between the villages of Cinque Terre and ended the day at a high viewpoint above Vernazza.

trip_days.title: Dolomites Ridge Hike
trip_days.summary: Spent the day hiking ridge trails in the Dolomites, watching jagged peaks fade into evening haze.

trip_days.title: Tuscan Vineyard Roads
trip_days.summary: Drove quiet country lanes around Montepulciano, stopping at vineyards as the hills glowed at sunset.

trip_days.title: Sicilian Coastline
trip_days.summary: Relaxed by the sea near Taormina, photographing rocky coves and the fiery evening horizon.

trip_days.title: Ferries on Lake Como
trip_days.summary: Took ferries between lakeside towns and waited on the promenade for dusk colors over Lake Como.

trip_days.title: Puglia’s Trulli Towns
trip_days.summary: Visited Alberobello’s trulli houses and wandered narrow lanes as the stone roofs warmed in evening light.

trip_days.title: Sardinia Beach Evening
trip_days.summary: A lazy beach day on Sardinia that turned into a peaceful pastel sunset over calm water.

trip_days.title: Tokyo Skytree Sunset
trip_days.summary: Explored the Sumida area and watched the city lights gradually appear around Tokyo Skytree at sunset.

trip_days.title: Boats on the Chao Phraya
trip_days.summary: Cruised along the Chao Phraya River in Bangkok, photographing long-tail boats against a glowing sky.

trip_days.title: Lanterns of Hoi An
trip_days.summary: Strolled Hoi An’s riverside as colorful lanterns lit up and reflected in the water during sunset.

trip_days.title: Arrival in Festive London
trip_days.summary: Checked into the hotel near Westminster and took an evening walk to see the first Christmas lights.

trip_days.title: Arrival in New York City
trip_days.summary: Landed in New York, settled into Brooklyn, and grabbed a quick first look at the skyline.

trips.title: South America Backpacking 2021
trips.summary: A month-long backpacking route through Peru, Bolivia, and Chile, mixing big cities with high-altitude hikes and overnight buses. Machu Picchu was the main goal, but side trips to salt flats and desert valleys made the journey feel even bigger.

trips.title: Christmas in London 2022
trips.summary: A short Christmas escape to London, wandering between Westminster, the South Bank, and festive markets along the Thames. Most of the time was spent chasing twilight light, hot drinks, and views of Big Ben dressed in winter colors.

trips.title: New York City Autumn 2022
trips.summary: An early autumn visit to New York City, splitting time between Brooklyn and Manhattan. Evenings were reserved for watching the skyline change color from Brooklyn Bridge Park and walking back across the bridge as the lights came on.

trips.title: Italy Coast and Cities 2018
trips.summary: A first deeper dive into Italy, starting on the dramatic Amalfi Coast before looping through Positano and up to Florence. The trip revolved around slow evenings near the water and long walks through historic streets at sunset.

trips.title: Italy Mountains and Lagoons 2019
trips.summary: Returning to Italy for a route that connected Rome’s ruins, Venice’s canals, and the cliffs and peaks of Cinque Terre and the Dolomites. Every few days the scenery changed completely, but sunset stayed the anchor of the daily rhythm.
trips.locationOverview: Rome, Venice, Cinque Terre, Dolomites – Italy

trips.title: Italy Road Trip 2020
trips.summary: A slower, more local-feeling return to Italy focused on countryside and coast. The route drifted through Tuscan vineyards, Sicilian shorelines, the calm of Lake Como, the trulli of Puglia, and quiet Sardinian beaches at day’s end.
trips.locationOverview: Tuscany, Sicily, Lake Como, Puglia, Sardinia – Italy

trips.title: Asia Highlights 2018–2020
trips.summary: A handful of shorter trips across Asia that gradually stitched together some favorite cities and riverside sunsets. Tokyo offered towering skylines around Skytree, Bangkok delivered life along the Chao Phraya, and Hoi An slowed everything down with lanterns and reflections on the water. The photos in this trip capture that mix of frantic energy and quiet evenings over a span of three calendar years, loosely linked by warm light, street food, and late walks back to the hotel after blue hour.

trips.title: Brazil 2022
trips.summary: A compact loop through Brazil that focused on coastal views, big-city energy, and high lookouts over the landscape. Even with a tight schedule, there was time for slow sunsets and watching the light fall across the city from above.
trips.locationOverview: Rio de Janeiro and surrounding regions – Brazil

trips.title: USA Road Trip 2019
trips.summary: Weeks on the road crossing several U.S. states, linking national parks, small towns, and major cities into one long drive. The trip finished with a stretch on the East Coast, using Brooklyn Bridge Park as the final sunset stop.

trips.title: Norway Summer Fjords 2023
trips.summary: A bright, cool summer spent moving between Norway’s fjords and small coastal towns. Long days meant late hikes, ferry crossings, and quiet harbors where the sun seemed to set in slow motion behind the surrounding peaks.
